violations.text: Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. PIC set up sanitizing bay of 3-bay and sanitized all previously washed equipment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to acquire test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
